clickSetup.finalStatusText:
Could not reach the local engine.
The Windows app starts the bundled engine automatically. In a source checkout, run these PowerShell commands once:
cd packages\engine
py -3.13 -m venv .venv
.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.lock
.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -e .
$env:TINKERQUARRY_DEV_TOKEN = "tq-dev-token"
.venv\Scripts\kimcad.exe web --port 8765 --demo
Check again
